researched_category.value: Web Data Infrastructure / Proxy & Scraping Platform
researched_category.notes: Bright Data is a comprehensive web data platform offering proxy networks (residential, datacenter, ISP, mobile), web scraping APIs (Web Unlocker, SERP, Scraper APIs), datasets marketplace, and AI-native MCP server for agentic web access.

one_liner.value: Web data infrastructure platform providing proxy networks, scraping APIs, datasets, and an MCP server for AI agents to access public web data in real-time.
one_liner.notes: From docs: 'All-in-one solution for public web access' and product descriptions across multiple pages.

methods.notes: Two methods: (1) API Access using an API key as a Bearer token in the Authorization header, (2) Native Access using proxy username:password combo. Both billed at same rate.

access.notes: Free tier: 5,000 credits/month, no credit card required, auto-applied to all new accounts. However, residential proxy access requires KYC (company email, business registration, potentially ID). For MCP/Rapid mode, no KYC needed. Free tier covers Web Unlocker API, SERP API, Web Scraper API, Scraper Studio. Proxy products/Browser API get $2 one-time trial credit.

summary.value: Comprehensive REST API at https://api.brightdata.com covering Web Unlocker API, SERP API, Web Scraper API (250+ pre-built scrapers), Crawl API, Datasets API, Scraper Studio, Proxy management, and more. Official Python SDK (brightdata-sdk) and npm package (@brightdata/mcp). OpenAPI spec available. The MCP server exposes 60+ tools for web search, scraping, structured data extraction from ecommerce/social platforms, browser automation.
summary.notes: API docs at docs.brightdata.com/api-reference. Broad set of endpoints for scraping, data feeds, proxy management, and AI agent interfaces.

agent_interface.notes: Official MCP server (brightdata-mcp) with 60+ tools, MIT license on GitHub, npm package @brightdata/mcp. Available on Composio as 'Bright Data MCP' toolkit. Also has official Python SDK.

rationale.value: Bright Data is fully buildable into an AI agent toolkit today. It has a documented public REST API with Bearer token auth, a generous free tier (5,000 requests/month, no credit card required), an official MCP server with 60+ tools, and official SDKs (Python, JS). The only caveat is that residential proxy access requires KYC (company email), but the MCP/API free tier works without that. The MCP server is already designed for AI agent integration and works with Claude, Cursor, LangChain, etc.
rationale.notes: All key requirements met: public API, self-serve free tier, API key auth, official MCP server, SDKs. No material blocker.

s1.quote: Bright Data provides two primary methods for authentication: 1. API Access - Authenticate and interact with the Bright Data platform using an API key/token. 2. Native Access - Authenticate and interact with the Bright Data platform using proxy protocol username and password.
s1.title: Authentication - Bright Data Docs

s2.quote: Bright Data's Products Pricing - Designed to meet enterprise companies' unique needs and challenges
s2.title: Top-Tier Proxies & Scraping APIs Pricing

s3.quote: Use the Bright Data MCP server to give AI agents real-time access to public web data with 5,000 free requests per month and zero infrastructure setup.
s3.title: MCP server overview - Bright Data Docs

s4.quote: The important part of this request is the Authorization header: 'Authorization: Bearer <token>' This <token> is your API key, which is required for every API request.
s4.title: Authentication - Bright Data Docs

info:

s5.title: Web Unlocker API - Bright Data Docs

s6.quote: Every new Bright Data account gets 5,000 free credits per month across Web Unlocker API, SERP API, Web Scraper API and Scraper Studio. No credit card required.
s6.title: Free tier - Bright Data Docs

s7.quote: The free tier is available to all new accounts and is applied automatically at signup.
s7.title: Free tier - Bright Data Docs

s8.quote: Our KYC process is a mandatory step for all new customers who wish to join our residential proxy network or gain special access rights. ... Bright Data accepts KYC applications from registered businesses with a company domain.
s8.title: Bright Data KYC Process FAQs

s9.quote: Reference for the Bright Data MCP server tools (60+ tools): web search, scraping, structured data and platform extractors for ecommerce and social workflows.
s9.title: Tools - Bright Data Docs

s10.quote: A powerful Model Context Protocol (MCP) server that provides an all-in-one solution for public web access. ... Stars: 2490 ... License: MIT License
s10.title: brightdata/brightdata-mcp

s11.quote: Securely connect your AI agents and chatbots (Claude, ChatGPT, Cursor, etc) with Bright Data MCP MCP or direct API to scrape websites, extract structured data.
s11.title: Bright Data MCP MCP Integration for AI Agents | Composio

limitations: Could not fetch the sign-up page (https://brightdata.com/sign-up) - returned 404. However, the free tier docs clearly state 'no credit card required' and auto-applied to new accounts. Residential proxy access has a KYC gate requiring company email/business registration, but the MCP/API free tier works without this.
